headline: Kavango Resources makes management changes
summary: Kavango Resources PLC (LSE:KAV, OTC:KVGOF) said it is reshaping its board and senior management team as the Southern Africa-focused metals explorer and gold producer prepares for its next phase of development. Peter Wynter Bee, currently interim chief executive and non-executive chairman,...
